name: Saint Martin (France)

colors.symbolism: details of the coat of arms

description: A white field charged with the unofficial coat of arms of Saint Martin in the centre.
history: Saint Martin is a French overseas collectivity in the Caribbean (the French half of the island of Saint Martin/Sint Maarten). As a French collectivity it has no separate official flag — the French tricolour is used officially. This unofficial flag (white with the local coat of arms) is widely used to represent the territory.

features.role: Coat of arms of Saint Martin
